requiredBindings.name: FM_PROGRESS_DB
requiredBindings.acceptance: FM_PROGRESS_DB or FM_PROGRESS_R2 must exist before full production progress readiness can pass.

requiredBindings.name: FM_PROGRESS_R2
requiredBindings.acceptance: FM_PROGRESS_DB or FM_PROGRESS_R2 must exist before full production progress readiness can pass.

requiredBindings.name: FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA
requiredBindings.requiredFor: private-video storage-backed upload, archive, delete cleanup, and production recovery

currentKnownBoundary.strictWriteGate: must fail before POST until FM_PROGRESS_DB or FM_PROGRESS_R2 is bound

nonAcceptanceCases: kv-single-write-fallback is stable but no D1/R2 primary progress store exists
FM_PROGRESS_DB and FM_PROGRESS_R2 are both missing
Cloudflare API token lacks D1/R2 permissions
